headline: Book Your Free 2-Hour Introductory Session
description: Experience how Verlin Labs teaches — through clarity, mental models, and deep understanding. No sales pitch. Just a focused session that shows you what's possible.

benefits.title: Core mental model framework
benefits.description: Learn our clarity-first approach to breaking down any complex topic.

benefits.title: Live AI concept walkthrough
benefits.description: See how we explain AI fundamentals without jargon or hand-waving.

benefits.title: Personalized learning path
benefits.description: Get recommendations tailored to your audience and goals.

benefits.title: Interactive Q&A
benefits.description: Ask anything — we prioritize understanding over covering slides.

benefits.title: Resource starter pack
benefits.description: Leave with curated materials to continue learning on your own.

benefits.title: Zero commitment
benefits.description: The session is genuinely free. Explore the full course only if it resonates.

agenda.title: Welcome & context setting
agenda.description: Understand your goals and what clarity-first learning means.

agenda.title: Mental models primer
agenda.description: A live demonstration of how we map complex ideas to understandable frameworks.

agenda.title: AI deep-dive (audience-tailored)
agenda.description: Walk through a core AI concept adapted to your background and level.

agenda.title: Hands-on exercise
agenda.description: Apply the framework to a real problem — together.

agenda.title: Your learning path & Q&A
agenda.description: Personalized next steps and open discussion.

faqs.question: Is the session really free?
faqs.answer: Yes — completely free with no hidden fees. We want you to experience our teaching style before considering the full course.

faqs.question: Who is this session for?
faqs.answer: School students (Classes 6–12), college engineers, and working professionals. Content is tailored based on your audience selection.

faqs.question: What do I need to prepare?
faqs.answer: Just bring curiosity and a stable internet connection. No prior AI knowledge required.

faqs.question: How long is the session?
faqs.answer: Exactly 2 hours, including a short break. We respect your time.

faqs.question: What happens after the free session?
faqs.answer: You'll receive a summary and optional next steps. If the full course fits your goals, we'll share enrollment details — no pressure.

faqs.question: Can I reschedule?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use the link in your confirmation email to reschedule up to 24 hours before your session.
